Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx basic,$0801,$ffff "HUSTLER-080F" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Hustler.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Changed the CMP #$3D instruction at $088C to RTS, NOP to remove the protection check (the value $3D is stored at $034C after the load from the original tape).
